name: O.R.C. Rust Beetle
description: The O.R.C. Rust Beetle is the artillery version of the standard rust beetle. It keeps its corrosive spit and mid-range game, but now pressures with more discipline and fewer gaps between shots.
behavior: It patrols O.R.C. zones and greenhouse edges looking for open firing lines at mid-range. If you do not force it to move, it can sustain harassment for a very long time.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and heavily punishes anyone who does not cut distance decisively. The real threat is not one hit, but how well it chains corrosion pressure and projectiles.
interactionWithCreatures: Inside O.R.C. groups it acts as corrosion support, softening targets so the front-line units can move in to finish them.
strategy: Water damage remains its major weakness. Pressure it after the close spray and do not fight from too far away, because mid-range is where it controls the fight best.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 50. Close-Range Spray: 37.5. Corrosive Shot: 56.25. Upward Shot: 56.25.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A short bite used when it has already kept you too close for too long.

abilities.name: Close-Range Spray
abilities.description: It expels a corrosive burst at close range to shut down easy frontal punishes.

abilities.name: Corrosive Shot
abilities.description: It spits an acidic projectile from mid-range to keep damaging while it repositions.

abilities.name: Upward Shot
abilities.description: It launches the shot on a higher arc to keep harassing even when you try to fight from elevation.
